name: Chocolate Sandwich Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat the cake mixes, eggs, and oil (the batter will be very stiff).
2. Roll the mixture into 1-inch balls; place on ungreased baking sheets.
3. Flatten slightly and bake at 350 degrees for 8-10 minutes or until a slight indentation remains when lightly touched.
4. Cool completely.
5. In another mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese and butter. Add sugar and vanilla; mix until smooth.
6. If desired, tint with food coloring.
7. Spread on one half of the cookies.
8. Top with remaining cookies.
